title: Evidence ledger entry (v5.4.0 pipeline — evidence ledger stage)
description: One evidence object backing one claim, per knowledge_base/architecture/08_evidence_ledger.md. Every field shown, stored, exported, or scored must have at least one evidence entry; a field marked Confirmed with no backing evidence is relabeled Unsupported and routed through hallucination controls. The evidence ledger is populated alongside matched_leads.json and feeds the dashboard evidence drawer.

evidence_id.description: Unique id for the evidence object itself (08: 'ev_<uuid>').

record_id.description: The lead, parcel, signal, or entity record this evidence supports.

field.description: The canonical field name being evidenced (e.g. owner_name, recorded_date).

value.description: The actual value as it appears in this evidence. Any JSON type; may differ from the final record value when multiple sources contribute.

status.description: Evidence status per 08. Unsupported is a temporary internal label — a record containing an Unsupported field cannot ship.

source_id.description: Source identifier matching a config/counties/<county_slug>.json sources key.

source_reliability_grade.description: Source reliability grade per 08. A/B can carry Confirmed; E can never back a lead-generating signal.

source_url.description: Verbatim source URL (or a valid offline path) — never templated.

source_document_id.description: Pointer into the source document for audit replay.

source_row_id.description: Pointer into the source row for audit replay.

match_confidence.description: 0-100, meaningful only for evidence that joins one record to another.

derivation.description: Required when status is Estimated — the formula or proxy used. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: 08 status rule: status Estimated MUST include a derivation object.
